mapper.select:
SELECT s.user_id AS userId, o.faction_id AS factionId, COUNT(DISTINCT s.oc_id) AS totalOcCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'Successful' THEN s.oc_id END) AS successCount, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN o.status = 'Successful' THEN s.oc_id END)::DECIMAL / COUNT(DISTINCT s.oc_id) * 100, 1) AS successRate FROM torn_faction_oc_slot s INNER JOIN torn_faction_oc o ON o.id = s.oc_id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND o.deleted = 0 AND s.user_id IS NOT NULL AND o.status IN ('Successful', 'Failure') AND o.executed_time >= #{sinceDate} AND (#{factionId} = 0 OR o.faction_id = #{factionId}) GROUP BY s.user_id, o.faction_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT s.oc_id) > 0
ORDER BY successRate ASC, totalOcCount DESC
ORDER BY successRate DESC, totalOcCount DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
